examples: The thermostat is connected by a link to the carburetor.
When he turned off the engine, gas began pouring out of the carburetor.
I think something is wrong with the carburetor. Would you check it for me?
Take care not to confuse Veblen with his contemporary Max Weber, the inventor of the carburetor.
My old Sporty has a conventional carburetor, but the current generation of Harley employs fuel injection, too.
